search: Best practices 2025-2026: when migrating off a vendored/forked SDK, switch package.json to '@modelcontextprotocol/sdk': '^x.y.z', npm install, test subpath imports (@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/mcp.js) resolve, verify lockfile/SBOM accuracy. For preserving a small local patch: patch-package (npm i -D patch-package; edit node_modules; npx patch-package <pkg>; commit patches/<pkg>.patch; postinstall: patch-package). CRITICAL CAVEAT for PUBLISHED/distributed packages (devlog-mcp IS published as @devlog-mcp/core with bin entries): patch-package only patches the MAINTAINER's local node_modules, NOT consumers who install the package — the SDK arrives transitively unpatched for end users. So the requestId-optional patch would NOT reach real users via patch-package. Recommended: remove postinstall for distributed CLIs (CI breakage risk); prefer dropping the patch or handling in OWN userland code. patch-package last updated 2023; pnpm/yarn/bun have native patch support. moduleResolution node16/nodenext + ESM subpath exports generally fine, watch for resolution quirks.
analyze_qwen: Feasibility 7/10. (1) relative '../server/mcp.js' -> '@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/mcp.js' safe IF SDK exports map + types complete; verify with tsc --noEmit --traceResolution. (2) deleting src/types.ts (SDK Zod schemas) and rewiring 31 files' CallToolResult import to '@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/types.js' safe IF SDK re-exports all used types and NO local augmentations remain. (3) HIGH regression risk on requestId-optional patch since spec keeps it required. Mitigation: runtime handling in own wrapper, or drop, or upstream it. (4) src/spec.types.ts is generated by fetch:spec-types (curls MCP schema); src/spec.types.test.ts validates conformance — once deleted, update/remove the script + test since SDK ships its own types. Concrete: rewire imports, verify package exports, delete vendored files, fix test imports. Needs rigorous CI + version pinning.
analyze_kimi: ORDERED COMMITS: A[audit requestId patch->decide drop] B[relocate Pawel helpers constants/devlog-utils/eventTargetConfig out of src/shared, update 10+ importers] C[npm i @modelcontextprotocol/sdk@1.17.1 --save-exact] D[rewire 31 type imports ../types.js->@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/types.js, NOT touching ../types/* or themes/types.js] E[rewire 4 server/client imports devlog-server,devlog-http-server,base-server,registry] F[remove fetch:spec-types script + delete spec.types.test.ts] G[delete vendored dirs/files - now unimported] H[verify full jest suite green @1.17.1 = de-vendor complete] I[bump @1.29.0 separate commit + adapt breaking changes]. KEY: rewire imports BEFORE deleting vendored files so build never breaks; tests run against npm package while vendored files still physically present (proves byte-clean), then delete. Relocate helpers before purging shared/.
